query:
UPDATE orders 
SET orderId = SUBSTRING(errorMessage, 13) 
WHERE status = 'placed' 
AND orderId IS NULL 
AND errorMessage LIKE 'CLOB order: 0x%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute
